business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Commercial Property Coverage Form CP 00 10 10 12; policy number cpGLFS20258823; combined premium of $235,710.77 covers all commercial property coverage parts
Commercial Property Coverage Form CP 00 10 10 12; included within combined commercial property premium

Business Income and Extra Expense Coverage Form CP 15 08 10 12; endorsement effective 03/15/2026; covers actual loss of Business Income during period of restoration including net income and continuing normal operating expenses

Endorsement CP 04 09 10 12; effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss to Covered Property caused by or resulting from an Equipment Breakdown accident to a scheduled object, including mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment

Endorsement CP 99 30 07 88; effective 03/15/2026; Coinsurance Additional Condition suspended for scheduled property during Declarations period; property value agreed to be not less than the Schedule amount

Endorsement CP 04 17 10 12; effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss to Covered Property caused by interruption of utility services including water supply, communication supply, and power supply services; handwritten annotation 'Need docs' present on endorsement page

positives: Agreed Value endorsement (CP 99 30 07 88) in place, suspending coinsurance penalty and eliminating underinsurance risk
Coinsurance at 80% satisfies threshold for full Coverage Extensions including Newly Acquired or Constructed Property, Property Off-Premises, and Non-Owned Detached Trailers
Comprehensive endorsement package: Equipment Breakdown, Business Income and Extra Expense, Agreed Value, and Utility Services Direct Damage
Business Income limit of $57,954,000 provides substantial protection against operational suspension losses
If two or more coverages with separate deductibles apply to the same occurrence, only the highest deductible applies, limiting exposure
Fire Department Service Charge, Pollutant Clean Up and Removal, Increased Cost of Construction, and Electronic Data coverages are in addition to applicable Limits of Insurance
concerns: Handwritten annotation 'Need docs' by M. Johnson dated 6/18/2025 on Utility Services — Direct Damage endorsement page indicates outstanding documentation requirements
All four endorsements carry a mid-term effective date of 03/15/2026, which is approximately 9 months into the policy period, creating a coverage gap for endorsement-specific perils prior to that date
Deductible of $50,000 per occurrence applies before any loss payment is triggered
Electronic Data Additional Coverage limited to $2,500 per policy year, which may be insufficient for a freight logistics operation relying on dispatch and tracking systems
Increased Cost of Construction Additional Coverage capped at $10,000, which may be inadequate given the scale of insured building values
Property Not Covered exclusions include accounts, bills, currency, automobiles held for sale, contraband, and foundations below lowest basement floor

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. SIC Code: 4215. Mailing address: 1200 Nationwide Boulevard, Columbus, OH 43215. Producer: Transportation Insurance Specialists.
